ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for weather conditions record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Current temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Current humidity percentage */,
  "pressure" INTEGER /* Current atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Current wind speed in m/s */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Current cloudiness percentage */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Current rainfall amount */,
  "snowfall" REAL /* Current snowfall amount */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Current visibility */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* Current UV index */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weather conditions were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_weather" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for historical weather record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Recorded temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Recorded humidity percentage */,
  "pressure" INTEGER /* Recorded atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Recorded wind speed in m/s */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Recorded cloudiness percentage */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Recorded rainfall amount */,
  "snowfall" REAL /* Recorded snowfall amount */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Recorded visibility */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* Recorded UV index */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weather data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_weather_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., IoT, Satellite, Local Station) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the update occurred */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., new entry, correction) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the update was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES weather_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, public) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the alert is issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., storm warning, heat advisory) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Details of the alert message */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was issued */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "expiry_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert expires */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the alert */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
